name.ja: アイスエイジ・パウンダー

requirement.en: Send this face-up card from your field to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Special Summon up to 2 Level 6 or lower Rock Type Normal Monsters from your Graveyard face-up to your field. Increase the Levels of the monsters Special Summoned by this effect by 1 until the end of this turn. Then, you can increase the Level of 1 face-up monster on your field by 1 until the end of this turn.
